confirmed_building.scope_note: Exact mall identity confirmed before Gate 3 evidence review.

document_inventory.description: The public application-status route is process context only; no target-specific OBO structural permit or review record was found for the confirmed building.

unresolved_exceptions.description: No public target-specific OBO structural review, correction sheet, permit identifier, or certified review record was found.
